title: additional Time Tracking information
excerpt: I want to be able to see how much time employees have spent in a month AND how much time they specifically spend on each item they tracked.  Ex: Employee tracked 1 hour on task 1 on board X, 15 minutes on task 17 on boar…

posts.author: SouthSwellDigital (Melissa Good)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to be able to see how much time employees have spent in a month AND how much time they specifically spend on each item they tracked. Ex: Employee tracked 1 hour on task 1 on board X, 15 minutes on task 17 on board Y, etc.
